title: medicago ruthenica
intro: Medicago ruthenica, also known as Russian clover, is a perennial legume native to Eastern Europe and Western Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to inhibit the growth of bacteria and fungi, making it effective against infections and inflammation. The health benefits of Medicago ruthenica include its potential to reduce blood pressure, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Traditional herbal preparations involve making teas, infusions, or tinctures from the leaves and roots of the plant, which can be used to treat various health issues.
